headline: Lightning Round: Stay long Primoris Solutions, says Jim Cramer
summary: 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer weighs in on stocks including: EOG Resources, American Express, Primoris Services, and more.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on LyondellBasell Industries, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: Jefferies  analyst Laurence Alexander   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Hold and raises the price target from $51 to $70.

headline: LyondellBasell to address 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: HOUSTON and LONDON, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB), a leader in the global chemical industry, today announced that Agustin Izquierdo, executive vice president and chief financial officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C., on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 3:40 p.m. EDT. Webcast and Presentation Slides AccessA live webcast can be accessed at the time of the event at https://investors.lyondellbasell.c

headline: Methanex (MEOH) Surges 6.4%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Methanex (MEOH) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: The More You Sold, The More I Bought: LyondellBasell
summary: LyondellBasell has recalibrated its dividend, cutting it by 50% to $0.69/share. Read more on how the move improves capital efficiency and balance sheet strength.
